title: Vaccine Storage and Handling Resources | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
Handling Module 
This one-hour web-on-demand video provides comprehensive recommendations and best practices on vaccine storage and handling.
Pink Book Webinar: Vaccine Storage and Handling Module 
This web-on-demand, self-paced module is for healthcare providers who administer COVID-19 vaccines. This module includes information about approved COVID-19 vaccines, Emergency Use Authorization, vaccine safety, and guidelines on vaccine storage, handling, administration, and reporting.
COVID-19 Vaccine Training: What Healthcare Professionals Need to Know 
Additional Best Practices 
Notice 
Storage and handling information in previously published CDC documents, such as the 13th Edition Pink Book, may be outdated. If you find any inconsistencies, please follow the guidelines in the newer toolkit or more recently dated materials on this page. 
This At-a-Glance guide compiles several resources for vaccine administration, storage, and handling.
Vaccine Administration and Storage and Handling Resources Guide 
This chapter of the Pink Book provides an overview of best practices for vaccine storage and handling. See the note above about referencing this document.
Pink Book Chapter on Vaccine Storage and Handling 
This webpage includes vaccine administration, timing and spacing of vaccine doses, observation of precautions and contraindications, management of vaccine side effects, etc.
Provid
